inputs.name: animate
inputs.description: Whether or not to animate changes to the progress bar's valueNow.

inputs.name: state
inputs.description: The state for the progress indicator.

inputs.name: unit
inputs.description: Custom unit if you would like to override the default percentage.

inputs.name: valueMax
inputs.description: The maximum value possible for the progress indicator.

inputs.name: valueMin
inputs.description: The minimum value possible for the progress indicator.

inputs.name: valueNow
inputs.description: The current value for the progress indicator.

inputs.name: valueText
inputs.description: The text to display if you would like to override the default percentage text.
